subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-01-18
subcodes.first_line: Truly I say if at every moment we praise Baha'o'llah a hundred thousand times for His bounties and gifts, we shall be unable to express adequately
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @praise of Western values; culture, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @thankfulness; gratitude
